property_scores.justification: Precise value 'Technology / B2B SaaS' directly matches taxonomy enumeration with clear software-only business model evidence.
Highly specific 'EdTech / Higher Education Operations Software — PBSA tech' with 25+ year specialization and 85% UK university penetration as proof.
Clear picks-and-shovels positioning with real estate property management analogy; slight inference on 'infrastructure layer' but well-aligned with taxonomy.
Well-reasoned 'Mature with consolidation dynamics' aligns with taxonomy INCLUDES (established players, incremental growth); APUC framework confirms market entrenchment.
Precise 'Recurring subscription (SaaS) with professional services secondary' directly matches taxonomy enumeration with multi-year contract evidence.
Well-evidenced 'Managed software product with implementation/support services' aligns with taxonomy hybrid model; Customer Portal and customer experience references confirm.
Correctly assessed as 'Fixed-cost-heavy; high gross margin software' but confidence is medium (inferred from Volaris model, no public margin data).

Exceptionally detailed analysis of multi-layered moat (switching costs, procurement lock-in, data network effects, community flywheel) with specific evidence; confidence medium-high (not independently verified).

Four critical dependencies clearly articulated (University IT, HE sector health, cloud infrastructure, Volaris capital) with strong contextual evidence; confidence medium (some inference on capital gating).
Specific estimate (~86 employees, Oct 2024) from third-party LeadIQ data with five-continent geographic breakdown; confidence low-medium (unverified external source).
Revenue band '$10M-$100M ARR estimated' inferred from customer count (350+) and typical HE SaaS ACV; confidence low (no public financials, fully calculated).
Precisely documented 'Corporate-subsidiary / Volaris Group permanent-hold' with confirmed January 2015 acquisition and TSX:CSU parent structure.
Unambiguously 'Asset-light (software company)' with no manufacturing or inventory; Companies House registration confirms pure software business.
Assessment 'Profitable / stable; positive cash flow' inferred from Volaris permanent-hold model and four tuck-in acquisitions; confidence low-medium (no public financials).
Precisely documented founding year 1998 with Companies House registration history and co-founder names (Wildsmith, Ashley); '25+ years' claim verified.
Property marked null in manifest; no profile_fill provided despite 350+ customers and 700,000+ managed beds being mentioned in other properties.
Well-articulated 'Mature/Optimization with deliberate inorganic growth layer' supported by 85% UK market saturation and strategic acquisition pattern; confidence high.
Precisely identified 'Enterprise and mid-market — HEIs and PBSA operators' with formal procurement (APUC) and complex multi-stakeholder decision signals.
Market leader in UK/Europe (85% university penetration, #1 APUC ranking) and strong global challenger (vs. StarRez dominance) clearly evidenced.
Primary GTM clearly 'Sales-led (direct enterprise) + procurement-framework-led + partner/channel' with Book a Demo CTA and APUC ranking evidence.
Assessed as 'Diversified — no single customer dominant' based on 350+ global customer base; confidence medium (no explicit concentration metrics provided).
Positioned as 'Mid-market to premium' supported by market leadership and '38% more revenue' ROI claim; confidence medium (no actual price points disclosed).
Precisely identified 'Professional management (external CEO appointed by corporate parent)' with Barry Anns appointment and founder exit timeline confirmed.
Identified as 'Functional silos with divisional product lines' based on four product verticals and dual-office UK structure; confidence medium (org chart not explicitly confirmed).
Detailed 'Hybrid multi-office (Milton Keynes + Ludlow) with fully remote North America' with confirmed office addresses and working patterns; confidence high.
Assessed as 'Engineering/product-heavy with growing commercial emphasis' based on acquisition strategy and CEO background; confidence medium (limited direct composition data).
Characterized as 'Transitional (25-year-old core modernising; new layers cloud-native)' from legacy platform age and KxEngage mobile addition; confidence medium (no architecture documentation).
Assessed as 'Intermediate (CI/CD and product iteration evident)' from multiple product releases and Ideas Forum; confidence low (no public engineering blog or OSS signals).
Estimated 'Basic to intermediate (BI and reporting; AI-readiness building)' from 700k+ beds benchmarking claim and Innovation Acceleration hiring; confidence low (no ML production evidence).
Positioned as 'Intermediate to advanced (enterprise-grade for HE compliance)' supported by public Security page and GDPR/APUC framework requirements; confidence medium (certifications not confirmed).
Accurately classified as 'Moderate' with GDPR, APUC public procurement, and JISC/NCSC frameworks; aligns precisely with taxonomy INCLUDES (data privacy, no heavy financial/healthcare regs).
Clearly documented as 'Regional-to-global (UK/Europe primary; 20+ countries)' with verified UK dominance and international expansion evidence.
Assessed as 'Moderately recession-resistant with HE-sector-specific exposure' with reasonable logic; confidence medium (sector vulnerability not quantified).
Precisely identified 'Parent-company governed (Volaris/Constellation TSX:CSU)' with documented ownership structure and Constellation quarterly reporting flows.
Characterized as 'Pragmatic with fast-follower AI ambition' from Innovation Acceleration team and HeyHub acquisition; confidence medium (cultural posture not independently verified).
Clearly positioned as 'Trust/reliability-first with community-building' well-supported by 25-year track record, Kinetic Live conference, Ideas Forum, and APUC ranking.
Property marked null in manifest; no public mission or values statement was assessed.
Assessed as 'Stable/reliable in niche; limited broader recognition' from graduate program and Volaris stability; confidence medium (limited Glassdoor footprint, minimal brand visibility outside HE).

summary.assessment_notes: Coverage reflects alignment precision with taxonomy definitions (1.0=exact enumerated match, 0.0=null/missing). Confidence multiplier reflects evidence robustness (1.0=primary/documented source, 0.55=heavily inferred). Dimension scores are unweighted averages of child properties. Overall score is mean of all 38 property final_scores. Re-evaluation corrects prior assessment: business-model and scale-resources properties were previously marked null but contain substantive manifest data.
